name: NEMAURA MEDICAL INC
summary: NEMAURA MEDICAL INC is a medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing non-invasive wearable diagnostic devices. Headquartered in Loughborough, United Kingdom, their primary product is the sugarBEAT® continuous glucose monitor (CGM) designed for use by individuals with diabetes and pre-diabetes. The device aims to provide real-time glucose data without the need for invasive blood sampling.
